candidate.objective: Highly experienced Poly Welder and Leading Hand with 15 years of dedicated HDPE pipeline welding experience across both local Perth-area and FIFO project environments. Paul has led welding crews of 12 to 20 staff and has held roles with ACM Resources, Innotech Site Services, Blue Energy, Charles Hull Contracting, and Kimberly Pipe/Plummers Industries across major sites including Roy Hill, Sino Iron Ore, Alcoa Pinjarra, Yandi, and Wheatstone. Holds PMBWELD301 and PMBWELD302 accreditations, a Skid Steer ticket, Integrated Tool Carrier, Telescopic Tool Carrier, and current Roy Hill, Rio Tinto, and FMG inductions.

duties: Undertook all aspects of poly welding including fabrication, pipe fitting, and hydrostatic testing across multiple ACM Resources project sites.
Installed and maintained HDPE poly pipe from 63mm to 800mm using Dixon and McElroy welding machines.
Conducted dewatering of external areas of tailing dams.
Fabricated pipework to refinery drawing specifications.
Applied excellent knowledge and understanding of technical and isometric drawings.
Installed and maintained HDPE poly pipe from 63mm to 630mm using Dixon and McElroy welding machines.
Operated telehandlers to load and unload poly pipe.
Performed dewatering of external areas of tailing dams.
Applied excellent knowledge and understanding of technical and isometric drawings.
Involved in the installation of 280,000 square metres of HDPE on the batters and floor of the Extended RDA (Residue Disposal Area).
Fabricated and installed a sub-drainage system in the RDA, including welding HDPE pipes and attaching a drain coil network.
Used, maintained, and serviced Demtech welders, extruders, and lysters.

employment.employer: Kimberly Pipe / Plummers Industries Joint Venture
duties: Led the installation of a pipe corridor approximately 14km long, comprising various pipe attachments ranging from 90mm OD to 710mm OD.
Utilised Dixon 225 and McElroy 500 and 900 welding machines.
Managed 21 road crossings, assisting with the setup of laser levels, pipe installation, backfill, compaction, and traffic control.
Performed bolting up of butterfly valves, blind flanges, and air valves.
Undertook various site roles through Torque Recruitment, Mass Recruitment, CPC Engineering, and Workpac including labouring, unloading sea containers, mulching, and general landscaping.

employment.role: Leading Hand Poly Welder / Acting Supervisor / Pipe Fitter
duties: Acted as supervisor including attending meetings, planning work, and liaising with management, engineers, and contractors to ensure efficient completion of scheduled works.
Led a 12 to 20 person poly welding crew fabricating fire water, potable water, utility water, and wastewater systems.
Worked independently from isometric drawings using data loggers and to strict quality standards.
Actively involved in planning and completing all construction phases including earthworks, formwork, concrete thrust blocks, valve and pit installations, and hydrostatic testing.
Maintained daily weld records, quality paperwork, weld maps, and represented the company at hold points and inspections.
Performed labouring and poly welding duties in support of FIFO project activities at Newman.

skills.detail: 15 years of HDPE poly welding experience across pipe sizes from 63mm to 800mm. Proficient in butt fusion and electrofusion welding using Dixon 225/500, McElroy 500/900, Demtech, and Ritmo machines.
Experienced Leading Hand capable of managing crews of 12 to 20 welders and pipe fitters. Experienced in work planning, crew coordination, and acting supervisor responsibilities.
Holds tickets for Skid Steer, Integrated Tool Carrier, and Telescopic Tool Carrier. Operated telehandlers for loading and unloading poly pipe and materials.
Proficient in maintaining weld records, data logger documentation, quality paperwork, weld maps, and ISO drawing interpretation. Experienced in representing the company at hold point inspections.
Holds confined space and working at heights certifications.

certifications.details: Accredited butt fusion welding of HDPE polyethylene pipelines.
Accredited electrofusion welding of HDPE polyethylene pipelines.
Certified to work in confined spaces.
Certified to operate skid steer loader.
Certified to operate integrated tool carrier.
Certified to operate telescopic tool carrier.
Rio Tinto Iron Ore site essentials induction — current.
